steps.subject: Quick introduction - IBM Infrastructure Solutions
steps.body:
Hi {{prospect_name}},

I hope this email finds you well. I'm reaching out because {{company_name}} is on our radar as a leader in {{industry}}.

Many infrastructure leaders are currently evaluating their VMware strategy given recent licensing changes. I'd love to share how IBM Fusion has helped similar organizations reduce costs by 50% while improving performance.

Would you be open to a brief 15-minute conversation?

Best regards

steps.subject: Connection request
steps.body: Hi {{prospect_name}}, I'd like to connect to share insights on infrastructure modernization trends in {{industry}}.

steps.subject: Following up: {{company_name}} infrastructure strategy
steps.body:
Hi {{prospect_name}},

I wanted to follow up on my previous email about infrastructure modernization.

I recently worked with a {{industry}} company similar to {{company_name}} that achieved:
• 50% reduction in infrastructure costs
• 40% faster deployment times
• Zero downtime during migration

Would you have 15 minutes this week to discuss your infrastructure priorities?

Best regards

steps.subject: {{company_name}}: VMware alternative assessment
steps.body:
Hi {{prospect_name}},

Given the recent VMware licensing changes, many IT leaders are evaluating alternatives.

IBM Fusion offers:
• 50% lower TCO vs. VMware
• Native OpenShift integration
• Enterprise-grade reliability (99.99% uptime)

Would you be interested in seeing how this applies to {{company_name}}?

Best regards

steps.subject: Discovery call
steps.body: Attempt to reach {{prospect_name}} to discuss infrastructure priorities

steps.subject: Case study: {{industry}} infrastructure transformation
steps.body:
Hi {{prospect_name}},

I wanted to share a recent case study from a {{industry}} company that migrated from VMware to IBM Fusion:

• Completed migration in 4 months
• 50% cost reduction
• Improved application performance by 35%
• Zero downtime

Would you like to see the full case study?

Best regards

cadences.name: US | Select | Infrastructure Leaders | Industrial | FlashSystems | Outbound | FY26

steps.subject: VMware licensing impact on {{company_name}}
steps.body:
Hi {{prospect_name}},

The Broadcom acquisition of VMware has created significant licensing changes. Many organizations are seeing 3-5x cost increases.

IBM Fusion offers a proven migration path:
• 50% lower TCO
• Seamless migration tools
• Enterprise support

Would you like to discuss {{company_name}}'s VMware strategy?

Best regards

steps.subject: Introduction: IBM Infrastructure solutions for {{company_name}}
steps.body:
Hi {{prospect_name}},

I'm reaching out to introduce IBM's infrastructure portfolio and how we're helping {{industry}} leaders modernize their IT infrastructure.

Our solutions include:
• Hybrid cloud platforms (IBM Fusion)
• Enterprise storage (FlashSystem)
• Power Systems cloud (PowerVS)

Would you be open to a brief introduction call?

Best regards

steps.subject: IBM i disaster recovery in the cloud
steps.body:
Hi {{prospect_name}},

Many IBM i shops are moving disaster recovery to the cloud for better RPO/RTO and lower costs.

IBM PowerVS offers:
• Native IBM i support
• Sub-hour recovery times
• 60% lower DR costs
• No re-platforming required

Would you like to discuss {{company_name}}'s IBM i DR strategy?

Best regards

steps.subject: IBM i cloud migration case study
steps.body:
Hi {{prospect_name}},

I wanted to share a recent IBM i to PowerVS migration:

• 200+ IBM i LPARs migrated
• 40% cost reduction
• Improved DR capabilities
• Maintained compliance

Would you like the detailed case study?

Best regards

cadences.name: US | Select | Infrastructure | IT Leaders & Architects | Flash Availability | US | FY26

steps.subject: 99.9999% availability for {{company_name}}
steps.body:
Hi {{prospect_name}},

Downtime costs {{industry}} companies an average of $300K per hour. IBM FlashSystem delivers 99.9999% availability - that's less than 32 seconds of downtime per year.

Key capabilities:
• Active-active replication
• Non-disruptive upgrades
• Cyber vault protection

Would you like to discuss {{company_name}}'s availability requirements?

Best regards
